zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Cave於1410年出生在英國坎布利其爾斯托福 姆 吉時，他的父親Peter Cave19歲，母親Anne Ingleby25歲。他於1440年與Mary Margaret Burdett在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1468年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Cave于1410年出生在英国坎布利其爾斯托福 姆 吉时，他的父亲Peter Cave19岁，母亲Anne Ingleby25岁。他于1440年与Mary Margaret Burdett在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1468年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Cave was born in 1410, in Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Peter Cave, was 19 and his mother, Anne Ingleby, was 25. He married Mary Margaret Burdett in 1440, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1468, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Cave est né en 1410, à Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Cave, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Anne Ingleby, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary Margaret Burdett en 1440, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1468, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Cave(이)가 1410년 영국 캄브리지실르 스타우 c 크이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Cave(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Ingleby(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Mary Margaret Burdett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1468년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Cave родился в 1410 г. в местности стоу кум куи, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Cave было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Ingleby, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Margaret Burdett в 1440 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1468 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
